theme: drone light show morphing between 3D figures
title: Empty Cones: Downwash-Aware Formation Morphing
strategies: identity baseline: keep the target labels as listed and fly everyone at once (reproduces the checker baseline)
min-distance greedy: match each drone to the Euclidean-nearest target (iterative closest pair) and fly a single simultaneous wave -- ignores the downwash cones
rotational in-layer matching: spend the free permutation to keep every drone in its own layer (angular-order match per ring), so drones orbit horizontally instead of diving through the stack
layered top-first descent: schedule one ring per wave, highest layer first, so a moving ring never shares a tick with a ring directly beneath it -- the cones stay empty
